description_long: This is a modern, low-floor city bus with a streamlined rectangular body and a predominantly teal exterior. The bus features large, tinted rectangular windows along both sides, separated by vertical pillars, and a prominent 'MOVE SMART' branding in both English and Arabic on the side panels. The front of the bus has a wide windshield, integrated headlights, and a subtle bumper, while the rear is more squared with minimal detailing. Decorative graphics, including a stylized leaf motif, are present on the sides and rear, adding a contemporary touch. The bus has two visible passenger doors on the right side, with the main entry door located near the front. The wheels are standard for urban buses, and the roof is equipped with a raised section, likely for ventilation or air conditioning.
description: A modern teal city bus with large side windows, 'MOVE SMART' branding, and decorative leaf graphics. It features two passenger doors and a streamlined, low-floor design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the right side of the bus with 'MOVE SMART' branding, two large passenger doors, and decorative leaf graphics.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the squared back of the bus, rear lights, and a partial leaf graphic on the left.
description_view_2: Side view of the left side, similar to the right but without visible doors and with the leaf graphic extending from the rear.
description_view_3: Front view showing the wide windshield, headlights, and a clean, modern front fascia.
attribute_window_arrangement: Large, evenly spaced rectangular windows along both sides, separated by vertical pillars; windows are uniform in size and shape, with no significant variation or grouping.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: 'MOVE SMART' branding in white and Arabic script on the side panels; no distinct manufacturer logo visible.
